Notes: Single UPDATE carries the same add_rr twice for the same owner/type/class/RDATA. The intended oracle is whether the server treats the duplicate as harmless redundancy or as a semantic error, and whether the RRset is created once.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR for dup.campus.edu. twice in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: dup.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether dup.campus.edu. exists after the UPDATE and whether the RRset is present as a single normalized set.
